diagnosticFindings.finding: evm_version=cancun produces bytecode that cannot invoke BITE precompiles. Use evm_version=istanbul per skill recommendation.
diagnosticFindings.verifiedBy: Failed tx 0x6abf4c4282bbb2e700bca921e1a3d3feddeb5d415987c73897fec1b25f10ac4c (cancun OOG) vs success tx 0x5178992c8e0351fa977a2766fe2ebb9002abbd070b50886b9aff961a57e41325 (istanbul success).

diagnosticFindings.finding: BITE.encryptECIES validates the public key is on the secp256k1 curve. Arbitrary (x, y) bytes32 pairs cause OOG.
diagnosticFindings.verifiedBy: Failed tx 0x42fb708aa7d6fc30517a370ee3f63505a513c2c3a5db57441888d4d07849ef6f (invalid key) vs success tx 0x30c93529ec9b3c2a040091972490ad921cd257088722a1f4bfdf37191d6d5f11 (secp256k1 generator).

diagnosticFindings.finding: Phase 3 ciphertext is bound to the encrypting contract's address as AAD. The CTX submitter must be the same address that produced the ciphertext.
diagnosticFindings.verifiedBy: Failed tx (CTXAbiToRlpConversionFailed when ciphertext encrypted by PrecompileSmoke 0xBfa3d8 was submitted via SealedPool 0x2c5442) vs success when SealedPool encrypts inline. Resolution success: 0x3062e7d53d094d36b7e97e68e17c4bb779966d3d7fd3d8091c1e6992002e51dc.

diagnosticFindings.finding: SubmitCTX precompile requires equal-length encryptedArguments and plaintextArguments arrays.
diagnosticFindings.verifiedBy: Mirrors confidential-poker showdown pattern. SealedPool now packs (marketId, betIndex) per encrypted arg.

phaseIntegration.phase2_ctx: BITE.submitCTX(0x1B) inside triggerResolution, encArgs/ptxArgs equal length
phaseIntegration.phase3_te_inline: BITE.encryptTE(0x1D) inside submitSealedBetWithEncryption (msg.sender = pool, AAD = pool address)
phaseIntegration.phase3_ecies_inline: BITE.encryptECIES(0x1C) inside submitSealedBetWithEncryption with bettor's viewer key
phaseIntegration.phase3_ecies_payout: BITE.encryptECIES(0x1C) inside onDecrypt re-encrypts each winner's payout amount under their viewer key

liveE2EProof.description: Full lifecycle proven on chain with real BITE precompiles
liveE2EProof.result: Bet 1 USDC.e on outcome 1, oracle resolved 1, received 0.99 USDC.e (1.0 - 1% protocol fee). Phase 3 ECIES re-encrypted payout claim stored at encryptedPayoutOf(1, 0).

v2_inline_predecessor.reason: First istanbul deployment, before adding submitSealedBetWithEncryption inline-encryption variant. Replaced by 0x05aD32... above.

v2_cancun.reason: Compiled with evm_version=cancun, bytecode incompatible with BITE precompiles.

v0_cancun.reason: Initial scaffold deploy with wrong callback fee.

PrecompileSmoke.purpose: Diagnostic wrapper around BITE.encryptTE / BITE.encryptECIES for direct precompile probes.
